reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) Gas station, good infrastructure in the middle of the desert, a mandatory stop for refueling, excellent convenience store.

(Original)
Posto de combustíveis, boa infra no meio do deserto, uma parada obrigatória para reabastecimento, excelente loja de conveniências

reviews.comment:
Mala atención. Única estación en muchos km. Venden muchísimo. Deberian ampliar las instalaciones y el nro de empleados en temporada.

(Translated by Google)
Poor service. Only station for miles. They sell out a lot. They should expand the facilities and increase the number of employees during the season.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzMHNDQkd3EAE

reviews.comment:
Evitenla si pueden ... si no les queda otra ... carguen solo combustible si es necesario ... porque en la parte del kiosco pueden llegar a pagar lo impensado por 2 caramelos 🤨

(Translated by Google)
Avoid it if you can... if you have no other choice... only fill up with fuel if necessary... because at the kiosk you can end up paying an unthinkable amount for 2 candies 🤨
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzNHVuZ1ZBEAE

reviews.comment:
Muy bien!!!

(Translated by Google)
Very good!!!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzX0pLeG5nRRAB

reviews.comment:
Aceptan débito, sus empanadas son muy ricas y no es caro, también tiene otras opciones como sándwiches de milanesa, hamburguesas, sándwich de miga, etc. Todo el espacio está limpio y en condiciones, incluyendo los baños. Tiene WI-FI y funciona muy veloz. Un gusto frenar a comer acá.

(Translated by Google)
They accept debit cards, their empanadas are delicious and inexpensive, and they also have other options like Milanese sandwiches, hamburgers, and miga sandwiches, etc. The entire space is clean and in good condition, including the bathrooms. They have Wi-Fi and it works very fast. It's a pleasure to stop and eat here.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzdkxpdzlnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Amplia buena atención, se pueden comer empanadas, hamburguesas, aceptan débito parada casi obligada en la Ruta 3.

(Translated by Google)
Spacious and good service, you can eat empanadas, hamburgers, they accept debit cards, a nearly obligatory stop on Route 3.
